reasoning: The document exhibits catastrophic table extraction failure, where approximately 90% of data rows in critical tables (Attendance and Roll Call Votes) are missing, leaving only headers. This structural failure is corroborated by both the LLM fidelity report (visual_score 0.23) and programmatic signals (fabricated_tables_detected), directly contradicting the pipeline's 'auto_approve' recommendation.

concerns.analysis: Two critical tables in the document are severely truncated. 1) The 'NORTH CAROLINA 911 Standards Committee Attendance' table on page 2 contains approximately 25 rows in the source but only 2 rows in the JSON (headers only). 2) The 'ROLL CALL VOTES' table on page 4 contains 12 rows in the source but only 1 row in the JSON. In both instances, over 90% of the data rows are missing.
